message:
feat(tui): add InProgress and Blocked status filters with I/B hotkeys

Extend the TUI filter system with two new status-based filters for
common issue lifecycle states that previously required scrolling through
the full list to locate:

- Add InProgress and Blocked variants to the ListFilter enum
- Implement case-insensitive status matching for "in_progress" and
  "blocked" statuses in the filter logic
- Bind keyboard hotkeys: Shift+I for in-progress, Shift+B for blocked,
  following the existing convention of uppercase letters for filters
- Update all three help text sections (recovery, focus, guide) to
  document the new B/I shortcuts alongside existing filter keys
- Add test_filter_hotkeys_include_blocked_and_in_progress_slices()
  verifying both hotkeys trigger correct filtering behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
